prompt: Generate a grid of diverse information graphics icons, representing various topics similar to those in image 2, but rendered using the clean line-based style and teal/blue color palette from image 1.
prompt_refined: Generate a grid of diverse information graphics icons. The icons should cover a wide range of topics, drawing inspiration from the varied subjects presented in image 2 (e.g., Medical, Transport, Financial, Environmental, etc.). Each icon must adhere to the clean, minimalist line-based style seen in image 1, utilizing its distinct two-tone teal and dark blue color palette, where dark blue forms the primary outlines and teal highlights specific elements within the icons.
objects: Icons with a clean, minimalist, line-based style
An icon representing data or statistics topics
